issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete: missing 'count' parameter (should be 5 cards to look at), missing 'filter' logic for type GERMA exclusion of [GERMA 66], and missing the card placement instruction (rest go to bottom in any order)
Second effect (Trigger + DrawCard) is incorrect and unrelated to card text; effect should not exist. The ability has no trigger condition after the main action—this appears to be erroneous DSL
SearchDeck should include detailed filter: type includes 'GERMA' AND card name is not '[GERMA 66]', with count limit of 1 reveal and 'up to' logic
Missing action for placing remaining 4 cards at bottom of deck in any order (requires secondary action or extended SearchDeck with placement destination)
